summary: Frontend-only refactor validation for OrderConfirmation page (Option C audit, Session 1). Verified all refactored sub-components (Confetti, StatusBadge, LinkCard, LinksSection, OrderSummaryCard, StripeCancelBanner, StripePollingBanner) render and behave identically to pre-refactor. All 15 feature checkpoints from the review request pass. Confirmed no functional regression vs HEAD~5 baseline. Tested on desktop (1280x900) and mobile (390x844). No page/runtime errors; only pre-existing 401/404 network noise from unauthenticated auxiliary endpoints (unrelated to refactor).
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing (NOT a refactor regression): LinkCard.js uses hardcoded French title attributes (title="Ouvrir", title="Copier") while the rest of the UI uses i18n L(). Was the same in HEAD~5 pre-refactor. Non-blocking — minor i18n inconsistency. The Share button in LinksSection correctly uses L() for its title.

Testability gap (minor): Refactored child components (Confetti, StatusBadge, LinkCard, LinksSection, OrderSummaryCard) do not expose data-testid anchors for their root elements. Only StripeBanners were given testids. Consider adding data-testid="order-summary-card", "links-section", "link-card-{idx}", "copy-link-btn-{idx}", "copy-all-btn", "download-txt-btn", "share-btn", "mock-confirm-btn", "status-badge-{status}" for future automation stability.

OrderConfirmation.js still ~392 lines and heavy — repeated inline L({...}) dictionaries for every label could be pulled into an i18n key map to further reduce file size in a future session. Not blocking.
test_credentials: admin@deezlink.com / DeezLink2024! used only to seed orders via /api/admin/orders/manual-create and /api/admin/links/import. No production/payment credentials touched.
seed_data_creation: Created via admin API: (1) 10 test Deezer links (urls like https://test-link-N.deezlink.example/*); (2) Completed order with 3 links id=0df1a26e-0640-4a0a-9d04-2299d749d084 (pack_3, 12 EUR); (3) Pending order id=78da85b1-8e38-4b11-95f8-c8920aaaf793 (used with ?mock=true to exercise mock-confirm flow, now completed); (4) Pending order id=79350533-0ba9-4ab2-a706-eb440526c028 (for Stripe banner tests). Cleanup not required—orders remain in DB but don't affect other tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor regression suite confirmed GREEN. Seed orders above can be reused. Admin API accepts pack_ids: single, pack_3, pack_5, pack_10 (NOT solo/duo/family — those are cosmetic names only used in OrderSummaryCard UI mapping which falls back to raw pack_id). Language picker defaults to EN (i18next detector); ?lang=fr query param does not flip language — use the in-app switcher if FR verification ever needed. Stripe banners render only when !isCompleted; test against a pending order id. navigator.share is absent in headless Chromium, so shareLinks() falls back to copyAllLinks() automatically. Clipboard grants done via context.grant_permissions.
